name: conventional-commits
description: Skills for planning, writing, validating, and executing Conventional Commits.

interface.shortDescription: Plan and write Conventional Commit messages.
interface.longDescription: Reusable skills for splitting changes, drafting Conventional Commit messages, and running a minimal commit workflow.
defaultPrompt: Use $conventional-commits:draft-message to draft a Conventional Commit message for my changes.
Use $conventional-commits:commit to commit the current work using Conventional Commits.
Split my current changes into logical conventional commits.
Commit the current work using Conventional Commits.
